name: libgraph-perl
title: libgraph-perl
summary: Perl module for graph data structures and algorithms
description:
Perl module for graph data structures and algorithms
This module contains the Graph module for Perl, a framework for
creating abstract data structures called graphs and hypergraphs.
(It is not for drawing any sort of graphics; for that, see the
GD:: or Graphics:: set of modules.) It also contains implementations
of several well-known algorithms that operate on graphs, such as
finding transitive closures, strongly connected components
(SCCs) and articulation points.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgraph-perl because Perl module for graph data structures and algorithms.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgraph-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgraph-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgraph-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
